programs.title: Loaded for Bear-Naked and Afraid
programs.desc: In Tennessee's Smoky Mountains, survivalists compete with black bears for resources. S09 E09.

programs.title: Category 5 Survival-Naked and Afraid
programs.desc: Two survivalists take on the swamps of Florida to survive for 21 days with no resources. S09 E01.

programs.title: Love at First Fight-Naked and Afraid
programs.desc: Nicaraguan island tests survivalists' bond amid sharks, cats and devastating flood. S09 E07.

programs.title: Blindsided-Naked and Afraid
programs.desc: Survivalists Angela and Steven face daunting challenges in the jungles of Panama. S09 E14.

programs.title: Trouble in Paradise-Naked and Afraid
programs.desc: Famished survivors Riley and Kyle test their limits in the Honduran jungle. S09 E11.
